ItacPersonItem.Notes: In December 1558, Bernardo moved to Venice and became chancellor of the Academia Veneziana. Tasso`s comments on the Academia Veneziana and its activities, as well as Gerolamo Molin`s invitation to publish `Amadigi` under the aegis of the Academy, can be found in Bernardo Tasso, Lettere (Padua: Comino, 1733), pp. 359-60 458, 459.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
